establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

accreditation.notes: Bachelor of Law programs are officially accredited and nationally recognized

vision_mission.vision: To become the leading College of Law in Egypt and the Middle East by complying with international standards in education, scientific research, innovation, and training while fulfilling social responsibility and serving as a distinguished Arab legal expertise house.
vision_mission.mission: To graduate highly qualified legal professionals capable of shaping the future of law nationally and internationally, while contributing to the social and economic development of the Arab region through comprehensive academic programs, distinguished faculty, and excellence in research, training, and consultancy.

dean_and_leadership.title: Dean of AAST College of Law & Professor of Law
dean_and_leadership.dean_statement: The future is the main focus of AAST College of Law. Our mission is educating students and enabling them to fulfill their duties in the legal field nationally and internationally.

educational_pillars: Highly qualified faculty members from Egyptian universities with top academic degrees
Strong emphasis on practical legal training
Development of legal reasoning, dispute resolution, and problem-solving skills

training_and_practice.description: Practical training through summer programs, legal workshops, professional clubs, and cooperation agreements with judicial and prosecution authorities.

facilities_and_resources: Modern classrooms equipped with advanced teaching technologies

student_regulations.special_conditions: Class size limited to a maximum of 25 students to ensure high-quality education.

quality_assurance.qa_description: Commitment to international standards in legal education, research quality, innovation, and academic governance.

strategic_positioning.focus: Legal education, international law exposure, judicial practice
strategic_positioning.target_students: Students seeking national and international legal careers
strategic_positioning.regional_role: One of AASTMT’s flagship law programs with international partnerships
